message: Created YPI Studio task 'YPI Studio 任务归档与知识沉淀能力'
intake brief and Trellis archive/knowledge research completed

已作为 YPI Studio 架构师完成规划产物，未修改生产代码。 ## Artifacts produced 已写入任务目录： - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-143557-ypi-studio-任务归档与知识沉淀能力/prd.md` - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-143557-ypi-studio-任务归档与知识沉淀能力/design.md` - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-143557-ypi-studio-任务归档与知识沉淀能力/implement.md` - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-143557-ypi-studio-任务归档与知识沉淀能力/checks.md` ## 方案要点 - 归档目录：`.ypi/tasks/archive/<YYYY-MM>/<task-id>/` - 知识目录：`.ypi/knowledge/` - 知识索引：`.ypi/knowledge/index.json` - 归档 key 建议：`archived:<YYYY-MM>:<task-id>` - API 扩展： - `GET /api/studio/tasks?scope=active|archived|all` - `PATCH /api/studio/tasks/[taskKey]` 支持 `{ action: "archive" }` - Tool 扩展： - `ypi_studio_task` 增加 `archive` action 和 `scope` 参数 - UI 扩展： - Studio Panel Tasks tab 增加 Active / Archived / All 筛选 - completed 任务显示“归档”操作 - 知识注入： - 主会话启动 / 输入轮次 / Studio 成员委派 prompt 注入 bounded `<ypi-studio-knowledge>` - MVP 不调用模型总结，只从现有 artifacts 确定性生成摘要 ## Validation 未运行 `npm run lint` / `tsc`，因为本轮仅产出规划 Markdown，未改生产代码。 ## Remaining risks - 归档流程中途失败可能造成 task 状态与目录位置不一致，设计中建议…
architect produced PRD, design, implementation plan, and checks; awaiting user approval before implementation

user approved plan with decisions: completed-only archive; cancelled for unfinished/recoverable; no unarchive; current-session model summarizes archive knowledge; add archive command; bounded relevant+recent injection

### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — added archive scope/body/result and knowledge index types. - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — implemented archive scanning, stable archived keys, archive move flow, knowledge Markdown/index persistence, runtime pointer cleanup, bounded knowledge context. - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — added `/studio-archive`, archive tool action, scoped task listing, knowledge prompt injection. - `app/api/studio/tasks/**` — added `scope`, archived key support, archive PATCH action. - `components/YpiStudioPanel.tsx` — added Active/Archived/All filters, archive button, archived metadata display, pathLabel-based file opening. - `docs/modules/api.md`, `docs/modules/frontend.md`, `docs/modules/library.md`, `docs/architecture/overview.md` — updated docs. - `.ypi/tasks/.../handoff.md` — produced required handoff artifact. #### Verification - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed. - `npm run lint` — passed. #### Notes / Risks - `/s…
implementation completed by implementer and local lint/typecheck passed

已完成检查。 - 修改文件： - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` - 修复 archived task 通过 detail/读写路径加载时被误判为 active 的问题；现在 `archived:<YYYY-MM>:<task-id>` 会保留归档元数据并正确触发 archived guard。 - 产出物： - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-143557-ypi-studio-任务归档与知识沉淀能力/review.md` 验证： - `npm run lint` — passed - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed 结论： - 已核对关键决策：completed-only archive、未完成任务不能归档且应走 cancelled、无 unarchive、`/studio-archive` 已加、知识注入有硬上限、UI fallback 文案明确、active scanner 跳过 `archive`、archived key/路径校验存在、UI 打开任务文件改为 `pathLabel`、docs 已同步。 - Verdict: Pass 剩余风险： - 低风险：archive 在最终 `renameSync(...)` 前已写 knowledge/index 并追加 archive event；若 rename 失败，当前实现可重试，但不是完全原子。 需要主会话决策： - 无阻塞决策。若要进一步收敛异常场景，可后续决定是否把 archive 流程做成更强原子化回滚。
checker passed review and validation commands passed
implementation, review, docs, and validation complete; preparing commit and push
